jobs.description: Deliver on-site hardware deployment and IMAC support for 1,700+ end users at a major quantitative finance firm, managing the full lifecycle from automated PC builds and new hire desk setups to workstation relocations and trader floor support. Maintain SLA-driven Jira ticket queues with detailed documentation, performing diagnostic troubleshooting and network connectivity testing. Provide white-glove, customer-facing technical support at all levels including C-suite, handling walk-up requests, floor walks, and VIP assistance. Manage IT asset inventory across local and global locations, coordinating equipment staging, storage room audits, and hardware preparation for deployments in partnership with Workplace Services and Technology Operations Engineering teams.
jobs.title: Desktop Support Engineer

jobs.description: Delivered Tier 1/2 support to 100+ employees across North America, collaborating with global IT teams in India and Europe in a 24/7 support model. Maintained 95%+ SLA compliance, triaging and resolving requests and incidents in Zendesk. Managed complete new-hire setups: laptops, mobile devices, printers, software, and account provisioning. Handled cross-time zone incident handovers, ensuring seamless global coverage and reducing resolution gaps. Analyzed recurring ticket patterns and recommended infrastructure improvements, reducing repeat issues.
jobs.title: IT Service Delivery Specialist

jobs.description: Provided first-line support to 500+ employees and lab staff in a HIPAA-regulated healthcare environment. Played key role during major incidents, executing business continuity procedures to minimize downtime. Onboarded 15+ new hires per month — account creation, laptop configuration, and security compliance. Resolved A/V, network connectivity, VPN, and remote access issues across locations.
jobs.title: Service Desk Tech II

jobs.description: The role involves the consistent review and assignment of issues submitted to the ConnectWise Service Boards via email, phone calls, or alerts generated from monitoring systems. Additionally, it encompasses providing Level 1 system administration support for essential IT systems, including Active Directory, Office 365, Microsoft Azure, Microsoft Defender, and Microsoft Intune.
jobs.title: Service Desk Engineer

jobs.description: In my role at the Waltham office, I successfully managed the IT inventory and lab equipment relationships, ensuring all resources were utilized efficiently. I played a key role in co-managing our Microsoft 365 tenant alongside our Managed Service Provider, streamlining our operations and enhancing collaboration. I spearheaded the implementation of Jira Service Management, establishing an effective ticketing system that improved our internal communication and issue resolution processes. Additionally, I introduced GitHub Enterprise to optimize our software development and version control efforts. A significant achievement was ensuring that the new Waltham office was fully operational within 24 hours of our move, demonstrating my ability to coordinate complex tasks under tight deadlines. Furthermore, I implemented a centralized SQL server for lab instruments, which enhanced data management and accessibility across the team.
jobs.title: IT Specialist

jobs.description: In my role, I focus on enhancing collaboration and communication through the creation of Microsoft 365 Teams and the management of email distribution lists. I also provide support for conference room systems, ensuring smooth operation and troubleshooting any issues that arise. Additionally, I handle the onboarding and offboarding processes for users, facilitating a seamless transition for new and departing team members. My responsibilities further extend to troubleshooting network and VPN issues, utilizing the FortiGate portal to ensure a secure and reliable connectivity experience for all users.
jobs.title: Senior Desktop Support

jobs.description: In my role, I have been responsible for the creation of virtual machines (VMs) tailored to meet the specific needs of end-users and various business requirements. I have managed Box accounts, ensuring that permissions are appropriately set for the company’s folders to maintain security and accessibility. Additionally, I troubleshoot CyberArk SSO issues to facilitate seamless access for users. My proactive approach includes responding to alerts from Cortex XDR, which helps in identifying and mitigating potential threats swiftly. I also coordinate with vendors to ensure proper maintenance of IT lab equipment, ensuring optimal functionality. Furthermore, I troubleshoot network issues utilizing the Cisco Meraki portal, thus maintaining a robust and reliable network infrastructure.
jobs.title: Senior Desktop Support

jobs.description: Key contributor to the OneView Windows 10 upgrade — coordinated migrations for 200+ workstations across BWH and MGH. Co-developed an internal bug-tracking web application using JavaScript and Node.js for Radiation Oncology. Provided desk-side and remote support for Radiology (BWH) and Radiation Oncology (MGH) in a HIPAA-regulated environment.
jobs.title: Desktop Support Analyst
